works: Designed and implemented RESTful APIs with a clear resource-oriented architecture, following HTTP standards, reducing frontend integration issues and improving data consistency.
Decomposed complex business features into smaller, maintainable units, improving development efficiency and code clarity.
Established and consistently applied a modular API design pattern using Grape and Entities to enforce uniform response structures.
Optimized slow database queries and reduced N+1 query issues in production APIs.
Gained deep understanding of Rails components through hands-on development and maintenance.
Developed a service layer architecture and integrated third-party APIs for external data processing and system communication.
Developed Depot, a shopping cart web app from Agile Web Development with Rails, gaining hands-on experience with database linking, form handling, session management, and Rails best practices.
Built an e-commerce backend using Grape, adhering to company backend standards and best practices for API structure and response handling.
Contributed to an open-source vehicle tracking system using React.js and Java, developing vehicle management, route creation, and scheduling features.
Managed a team of 3 members, overseeing project planning, task delegation, and timely delivery.
Created scripts to automate common tasks and improve development productivity.
